title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down a 4-pillar system that Alex Hormozi uses to run his businesses with AI, covering data as competitive moat, voice-first workflows, modular task breakdown, and compounding effects. The video also highlights a common team mistake that required a company-wide correction memo.
